title: Adult offenders
summary: 9084 Criminal — custodial sentences, community orders, fines, and disposal for adults.
learningObjectives: Outline types of sentence for adult offenders.
Explain custodial sentences and minimum terms.
Analyse community orders and suspended sentences.
Evaluate purposes and effectiveness of adult sentencing.

simpleExplanation.title: Sentencing adults
simpleExplanation.summary: Adult offenders face fines, community orders, suspended sentences, or imprisonment — the court weighs offence seriousness and offender culpability.

sections.content: **Adult sentencing** (2.3.1) opens 2.3. Know **sentence types** and when each applies.
